posts.author: JennaM_Reader74
posts.text: I can't go on like this anymore. I've tried everything to fix my anxiety but it feels pointless now. There's no point in fighting it any more. If you see this, please know that I might not be here tomorrow.
posts.explanation: This message indicates a personal crisis with potential self-harm risk, requiring specialist investigation.
posts.bio: Books, work, family and ordinary daily updates.
